hero.title:

Supply Chain
Forward
hero.subtitle: Integrated logistics and trading solutions built on technology, expertise, and sustainability — from storage to international trade.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title:
Built for the Future
of Logistics
about.p1: Alraedon Trading and Logistics Services is one of Egypt's emerging companies, established with an ambitious vision to provide comprehensive logistics and trading solutions that meet international standards.
about.p2: We aim to be a trusted partner for the food, trade, and supply sectors by offering an integrated system covering all stages of the supply chain — from storage and management to transportation, distribution, and international trade.
about.p3: The company adopts advanced digital systems for fleet and inventory management to ensure operational efficiency, transparency, and real-time performance monitoring.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A complete suite of logistics and trading solutions tailored to your business scale and needs.
s1_items: Cold and frozen storage for food products
Dry storage for packaged and canned goods
Real-time inventory tracking and rotation systems
s2_items: Fleet equipped with cooling and freezing systems
Smart route optimization and live vehicle tracking
Delivery management to sales points or export destinations
s3_items: Specialized consultancy in warehouse design and management
Assistance with Egyptian White List qualification
Digital transformation support for logistics systems
s4_items: General supplies of food products and raw materials
Import and export services for third parties
Trading in processed, fresh, and frozen food products
Linking local producers with international buyers
s5_items: We possess extensive expertise in agricultural production, where we focus on cultivating high-quality crops using the best modern farming practices.
We are committed to applying food safety and quality standards throughout all production stages to ensure a final product that complies with international specifications.
s6_items: We provide integrated import and export services, including the supply and export of fresh and frozen agricultural produce and processed food products of all kinds, in accordance with the highest international quality standards.
We manage all stages of the process, from procurement and packaging to shipping and clearance, ensuring products arrive efficiently and on time.

vision.label: Our Direction
vision.vision_text: To become the first choice in Egypt and the region for integrated logistics and trading solutions, leading a transformation in supply chain management through innovation, technology, and reliability.
vision.mission_text: We deliver comprehensive logistics and trading services built on technology, expertise, and sustainability to support our clients' success — providing smart, flexible, and tailor-made solutions that meet the specific operational needs of each business.
values: Commitment to deadlines and quality standards
Sustainable partnerships with clients and suppliers

sustainability.label: Our Commitment
sustainability.title:
Sustainability &
Environmental
Responsibility
sustainability.text: Alraedon is committed to implementing eco-friendly logistics operations aimed at reducing emissions and energy consumption. We strive to apply sustainable practices such as route optimization, digital documentation, and efficient fleet utilization that minimize our carbon footprint.

pillars.title: Route Optimization
pillars.desc: Smart algorithms minimize travel distances and fuel consumption across every delivery.

pillars.title: Digital Documentation
pillars.desc: Paperless processes reduce waste and streamline operations end-to-end.

pillars.title: Efficient Fleet
pillars.desc: Maintained and optimized vehicles reduce emissions while maximizing delivery performance.
